this dir is syncthinged -- we only want to sycnthing markdown documents and nothing else (no git, no code, no build artifacts)

The `.stignore` has three rules:

1. `!*/` ‚Äî don't ignore any directory (so Syncthing recurses into `docs/`, `Plans/`, `src/`, etc.)
2. `!*.md` ‚Äî don't ignore `.md` files
3. `*` ‚Äî ignore everything else (`.rs`, `.toml`, `.lock`, `.git`, build artifacts, etc.)

This will sync `README.md`, `M1.md`, everything under `docs/`, `Plans/`, and any other `.md` files, while leaving all code and build artifacts unsynced.
